description: This email template is a powerful tactic for non-profit organizations to commemorate International Women's Day (iwd). With a dark mode aesthetic, it's designed to highlight the strength and resilience of women worldwide, making it an ideal choice for activism-focused campaigns. The template's content is geared towards inspiring action and raising awareness about women's rights, equality, and empowerment. It offers a platform to share stories, achievements, and the ongoing struggles women face every day. The streamlined design ensures your message stands out, while the intuitive layout makes it easy to customize with your organization's unique branding and content.
short_description: Celebrate International Women's Day with our striking email template, ideal for non-profit organizations and activism campaigns. Optimized for dark mode, it encourages engagement, donations, and support for women's rights. Promote gender equality and inspire change with this powerful tool.

designer.description:
I am a creative multidisciplinary person, with a broad vision in the world of design and communication. 
All of this, thanks to extensive experience in different fields: web design, online design, corporate identity, creation of web structures and functionalities, illustration, audiovisuals, apps, and even digital art.
